mechanics.excerpt: The Federated Suns was the birthplace 0f the Unfinished Book movement; which has made great strides in blurring the boundaries among disparate faiths The Lyran Alliance also promises religious freedom and has oiten promoted religious harmony: The Interfaitn Congress that produced the Unfinished Book movement was modeled after the Lyran Commonwealth Religious Council, founded in 2590_ The council analyzes incidents with religious overtones and edu: cates the masses about various religions large part of the counci' success comes from the average Lyran citizen' prac tical nature.
